summary: Good soundboard capture of a unique show highlighted by an epic post‑Terrapin jam and a massive 25‑minute drums/space segment.
review: The recording, sourced from a soundboard composite, delivers clear audio that lets listeners experience a long, fascinating jam after Terrapin Station like never before. While the reviewer admits it isn’t the best show ever, the uniqueness of the extended jam and the 25‑minute drum/space excursion make it a memorable performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review emphasizes strong musical moments and improved audio over previous audience tapes; limited data yields low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes the new composite sounds far better than the old audience tape, allowing the long jam to be heard clearly.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Show described as unique with a notable extended jam after Terrapin and an unusually long 25‑minute drums/space segment; overall not the best but memorable.

band_member_comments.Drums: Long 25‑minute drum/space segment highlighted by reviewer
